headline: Slate Path Capital Exits GitLab Stake, According to Recent SEC Filing
summary: GitLab helps companies manage how software moves from idea to release. As AI agents enter that process, Duo could strengthen GitLab’s role to teams that need speed without losing control.

raw.summary: GitLab helps companies manage how software moves from idea to release. As AI agents enter that process, Duo could strengthen GitLab’s role to teams that need speed without losing control.

headline: Analog Devices Reports Stellar Earnings. It Also Made This $1.5 Billion Power-Chip Purchase.
summary: The chip maker reports better-than-expected earnings and revenue for its fiscal second quarter, and agrees to acquire Empower Semiconductor.

headline: Tech leaders favoured by hedge funds last month, Hazeltree says
summary: Hedge funds stuck to their holdings in companies with ‌strong fundamentals in April, particularly technology ‌and semiconductor stocks, according to a report on Wednesday ​from data platform Hazeltree, in a month when the S&P 500 jumped over 10%.

raw.headline: Tech leaders favoured by hedge funds last month, Hazeltree says

headline: NVIDIA Started The AI Rally — Now Memory And Power Chip Stocks Are Stealing The Spotlight
summary: Analysts say the AI spending boom is reshaping the chip industry, driving massive demand across memory, networking, and infrastructure.
